mnemonics.title: NameNode vs. DataNode
mnemonics.content: **NameNode is the Brain, DataNode is the Brawn.** The NameNode (Master) holds all the knowledge (metadata) and gives orders. The DataNodes (Slaves) do the heavy lifting of storing the actual data.

mnemonics.title: Replication Placement Policy (for default factor of 3)
mnemonics.content:
**Rack Trick: One, Two, Buckle My Shoe.**
- **One** replica on the local node (client node).
- **Two** (the second replica) on a different rack.
- The third replica goes on a different node in the **same rack as the second** replica (to 'buckle' or secure it within that rack).
